sections.sectionTitle: Jeremiah A Lungkimlohna leh Topa' Dawn'kikna

verses.text: Topa aw, nang tawh thu i kisel ciangin nang a tawntungin na man den hi. Ahih hangin thu khat ka hong dongnuam lai hi. Bang hangin migilote daupai uh a, mikhem hatte gualzo sese ahi uh hiam
Nangmah in amaute na suan a, amaute in zong zung kha-in, khangin, gah hong gah uh hi. A kam uh tawh hong phat khem uh a, a lungsim uh nang tawh kigamla hi

Ahih hangin Topa aw, nangmah in kei nong thei hi. Ka gamtatnate nong mu a, nang ka hong itna thu na hong thei hi. Amaute pen gawh dingin a kikoih tuu bangin kaikhia in la, a kigawh ni hun ding a tun' mateng tuamkoih in

Ka gamsung bang tanvei keucip ding ahi hiam? Mun khempeuhah lopate bang tanvei vulcip ding ahi hiam? A teng mite' gitlohna hangin gamsate leh vasate a mangthang khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I gamtatnate Pasian in hong mu kei ngawn,” a ci uh hi

Topa in, “Jeremiah aw, mite tawh tai kidem a, nangmah hong gimsakzo uh ahih leh, sakol bangci demzawh ding na hiam? A nopna munah tuk lailai na hih leh Jordan gun gei sing kawm lakah bangcih ding na hi hiam

Bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggamte leh na innkuanpihte nangawn in nang hong zuak uh a, nang a hong do ding mihonpi a kaikhawm uh hi. Kam khum tawh nang a hong zol uh hangin um kei in,” ci-in hong dawngkik hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka inn ka nusia khin a, ka luahsa mite ka paimangta hi. Ka it mahmah ka mite, a galte uh' khutsungah ka piata hi
Ka luah dingin ka teelsa mite in gamlaka humpinelkai bangin kei' langkhatah pangin hong hawksan uh ahih manin amaute ka mudah hi
Ka mite pen, sasialne vasa gial khat, sasialne vasa dangte in a kimkot panin a tuk huan nainai uh tawh a kibang uh hi. Gamsate aw, hong kikhawm un la, pawi hong siim un
Tuucing dang tampi in ka leenggah lo hong suksiatsak uh a, kei-a' teng hong tuatcilsak uh hi. A hoih mahmah ka leenggah lo pawnlak, gamlak, a suaksak uh hi
Pawn lak hong suahsak uh a, dahin ka kap hi. Gamsung khempeuh a kisiat khit hangin kuamah in phamawh salo sawnsawn uh hi
Sehnel gam mualsang panin a susia dingte hong paizo uh hi. Gammong khat panin gammong khat dongah a lungmuang kuamah omlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' namsau in mi khempeuh a vattuk hi
Amaute in mangbuh tuh uh a, ahi zongin kiak bek a ngah uh hi. Nasep a hahkat mahmah hangun bangmah a ngah kei uh hi. A kihtakhuai Topa' hehna hangin anlak hun ciangin a maizum ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Ka mi Israel-te' luah dingin ka piak gamh a susia nuam a gilo a vengte tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cihin-ah, “En un, a gam uh panin amaute ka botkhia ding a, amau' khutsung panin Judah mite ka suaktasak ding hi
Ahih hangin amaute ka lakkhiat khit ciangin ka hehpihkik ding a, amau' luah ding amau' gam ciatciat uhah ka koihkik ding hi

Tua ciangin, ka mite' omdan hoihtakin a sin uh a, Baal min tawh a kiciam dingin ka mite a sinsak mah bangun, ‘ Topa a nuntak mah bangin,’ ci-in keima min tawh kiciam ding a sin uh leh ka mite lakah kiptakin a om ding uh hi
Ahih hangin gam khat peuhpeuh in ka thu hong ngaih kei leh tua gam botkhia-in ka susia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a ci hi.
